recommendations.product_name: Combat Max Roach Killing Bait (bait stations)
pros: Long-lasting bait stations for ongoing control
Easy, low-mess placement in corners and cabinets
cons: Less effective on very large infestations alone
Some formulations use fipronil which has usage restrictions

recommendations.product_name: Hot Shot Ultra Liquid Roach Bait (liquid bait stations)
pros: Fast-acting liquid bait — attracts roaches with water + food
cons: Needs monthly checks and replacement every few months
Contains dinotefuran — keep away from kids/pets
